# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- For evaluation of the MartianRobot submission, ignore the later-added backward movement feature and ignore the tests unless explicitly requested. Treat a UI or interactive console app as not required unless explicitly requested.
- For MartianRobot design suggestions, prioritize an approach where move types/commands are easy to add and extend. Keep move logic inside command classes rather than in a separate movement service when using the command pattern.
